2378530.name: Trust Your Ears
2378530.description:
Enter the realm of darkness in Trust Your Ears, an innovative blend of on-rails shooter and audio-driven horror game. Plunge into the enigmatic world of a haunted asylum, where your vision is robbed and your only ally is your sense of hearing.

In this pulse-pounding adventure, you'll rely on the power of sound to navigate the pitch-black corridors, detect lurking dangers, and confront the unseen terrors that haunt the asylum.

Collect key fragments scattered throughout the asylum to unlock the path to freedom, but beware - the chilling whispers and eerie footsteps you hear may not always lead you to safety. Hone your listening skills and trust your ears to survive the harrowing encounters with the malevolent spirits that inhabit the darkness.
2378530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
